heading: Participation of teachers from private schools
label: 3922 Participation of teachers from private schools
text: The Foundation shall, after consultation with appropriate private school representatives, make provision for the benefit of teachers in private elementary and secondary schools in the programs authorized by this subchapter, in order to assure equitable participation of such teachers.
notes: Prior ProvisionsPrior sections 3922 to 3954 were omitted in the general revision of this subchapter by .section 201 of Pub.
